title: Incorrect result with NOT IN operator and partial index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT, c VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INT PRIMARY KEY, y FLOAT);
SELECT 'result_one', * FROM t2 WHERE x NOT IN (SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE b = 2);
key_bug_features: NOT IN operator with partial index on table
